title: FTX collapse with Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong + election results, macro update & more
description:
(0:00) New bestie game show!

(6:20) Election recap: Red wave falls flat, Republican party flips from Trump to DeSantis, a rebuke of extremism

(20:47) Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong joins to break down the FTX collapse, further contagion risk, regulation, and more!

(43:32) Red flags exhibited by Sam Bankman-Fried and FTX, lack of governance/diligence

(1:06:00) Macroeconomic picture, lower than expected CPI print catalyzes market tear, advice for founders

analysis.summary: The episode covers the FTX collapse, election results, macroeconomic updates, and more with Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong. The hosts discuss the red flags exhibited by Sam Bankman-Fried and FTX, and the potential contagion risk. They also touch on the macroeconomic picture and provide advice for founders.

takeaways.text: FTX collapse has whiffs of Enron-like scandal
Red flags exhibited by Sam Bankman-Fried and FTX
Lack of governance and diligence at FTX
Lower than expected CPI print catalyzes market tear
Founders should be cautious of market volatility
Regulation is needed to prevent similar collapses
Republican party flips from Trump to DeSantis

sentiment.notes: The hosts are cautious about the market and the potential contagion risk, but also optimistic about the potential for regulation to prevent similar collapses.

notable_moments.description: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong joins the show
Election recap: Red wave falls flat
Brian Armstrong discusses FTX collapse and regulation
